name: metodologia-engine
description: MetodologIA Proposal Engine — Agentic ecosystem for bilingual (ES+EN) commercial proposal generation. 7 specialized subagents collaborate through a conductor to handle any-quality input, verify legal compliance, resolve branding at runtime (own|cobrand|whitelabel), and produce 10 proposal files (HTML·DOCX·XLSX·PPTX·MD × ES+EN). Activate with /propuesta, /cotizacion, /catalogo, /verificar, or /actualizar-catalogo.
